description: You are a detective reconstructing the sequence of events on a suspect's USB drive to establish a timeline of actions. Document the file system activity from the disk image at /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd by performing a timeline analysis focusing on recent activity in an Autopsy case named 'Timeline_Analysis_2024' (Case Number: 'INV-TML-003'). The analysis must produce a pipe-delimited timeline at /home/ga/Reports/fs_timeline.csv with the header DATETIME|FILENAME|FULL_PATH|EVENT_TYPE|SIZE_BYTES (using event types 'MODIFIED', 'ACCESSED', 'CREATED', and 'CHANGED') and a narrative report at /home/ga/Reports/timeline_report
